title: CancerIQ - Hereditary Cancer Risk Platform
problem: Hereditary cancer risk assessment is underutilized due to lack of integrated tools in clinical workflow, missing high-risk patients.
solution: AI-powered hereditary cancer risk assessment platform integrated into clinical workflows for identifying and managing high-risk patients.
technology: Machine learning, risk modeling algorithms, genetic variant databases, EHR integration
target_customer: Cancer centers, oncology practices, breast centers
ai_type: ML for risk calculation and variant interpretation
regulatory_notes: Clinical decision support, no FDA clearance needed
varden_fit: Moderate - Niche but valuable care coordination tool for oncology. Risk stratification enables targeted screening.
notes: Important for precision oncology. Genetic risk assessment becoming standard of care.
